headline: Equinix (EQIX) Raised to $1,215 by Truist Following Q1 Results
summary: Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) is one of the Best Digital Infrastructure REITs to Buy According to Analysts. On May 1, Truist raised its price target on Equinix to $1,215 from $1,127 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares following the announcement of the company’s first quarter financial results, according to a report by TheFly. Earlier, […]
